message.content:

PASS (3) - "Informations personnelles" section with Prénom: Marie, Nom: Dupont, etc.  
PASS (4) - "Formation visée" section showing "BTS SIO"  
PASS (5) - "Synthèse d'analyse IA" with 100% completeness bar  
PASS (6) - "Pièces justificatives" list with download buttons (Pièce d'identité, Baccalauréat, Relevé de notes)  
FAIL (7) - "Historique des actions" timeline NOT visible (missing from dialog)  
PASS (8) - Footer with 3 action buttons: "Marquer incomplet" (orange), "Rejeter" (red), "Valider" (green)
